title: quercus robur f. asplenifolia
intro: Quercus robur f. asplenifolia, also known as English oak fern-leaved or asplenifolia oak, is a variety of the English oak tree that is characterized by its fern-like leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus robur f. asplenifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and decoction, which can be used to make infusions, salves, and other medicinal products.
